name: MarsDog Token
description: Introduction to MARSDOG Tokenomics Total supply of MARSDOG: 21,000,000,000. Issued by Fair Mint, with a 4% tax on both buy and sell transactions. I. 3% Tax Allocation Accumulated in the contract address (blackhole-locked). Every 5 minutes, the contract automatically repurchases tokens equivalent to 0.1 BNB and transfers them to the blackhole for burning. II. 1% Liquidity Pool Reinforcement Once the accumulated amount reaches 0.1 BNB, a combination of 0.5% tokens + 0.5% BNB is bought and injected back into the LP, which is automatically transferred to the blackhole-locked liquidity pool. This rapidly strengthens liquidity and prevents sell-off pressure.
